title: Tick 10: Cloudflare Observability MCP query confirms outcomes-mcp received traffic on the live URL
question: Does the Cloudflare Workers Observability MCP return non-zero request counts grouped by trigger for the outcomes-mcp service confirming the deployed worker received traffic in the last 30 minutes?
success_criteria: query_worker_observability with filter dollar metadata service eq outcomes-mcp returns at least one trigger row with a non-zero request count
the result includes both GET healthz and POST mcp triggers proving the gate paths the orchestrator exercises are visible in observability
runroc outcomes runrocs C5-obs json captures the query the aggregation result the interpretation and the evidence window

capabilities: Cloudflare Observability MCP returned five trigger rows for outcomes-mcp
GET healthz and POST mcp triggers are both visible in the aggregation
16 requests total in the 30 minute window with 59 series timestamps returned
